inputs.label: Speed in knots
inputs.businessContext: The speed value in knots to convert.

inputs.label: Conversion factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from knots to kilometers per hour. Default is 1.852.

inputs.label: Decimal places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result.

formulas.roundedKmh: (function() { const r = knots * conversionFactor; const f = Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces); return roundingMode === 0 ? Math.floor(r * f) / f : roundingMode === 2 ? Math.ceil(r * f) / f : Math.round(r * f) / f; })()
